Hello,
I'm Lakshay!

I'm a BBA student at Chandigarh University and an AI-Driven Digital Marketing professional. I build data-informed content strategies using AI-assisted tools and prompt engineering, design and execute multi-channel campaigns, and create compelling social media narratives that convert.
My competitive edge: I don't just understand business, consumer behavior, and brand strategy — I apply AI to execute faster and smarter. From my work at Nation Innovation, I've scaled a LinkedIn channel from zero to 6,326 impressions with a 4,726% reach growth in just 90 days.

linkedin.com/in/lakshay-agarwal

01 — Social Media Management Nation Innovation

Nation Innovation is an ed-tech platform offering tech and digital skills courses. As Digital Marketing Intern, I managed their full social media presence, created SEO-optimised content, and leveraged AI tools to accelerate production while maintaining brand consistency.

🔗 nationin.com 📸 @nationin
The Goals
  • Increase brand visibility across platforms
  • Grow organic reach through SEO content
  • Maintain 3–4 posts/week consistently
  • Cut content creation time with AI tools
Skills Acquired
02 — Personal Brand Project AI & Marketing LinkedIn Channel

Built a niche LinkedIn content channel from zero focused on AI tools, digital marketing strategy, and personal growth. Using a data-driven editorial approach and AI-assisted content systems, I scaled reach and engagement consistently — posting 3–4×/week with measurable weekly iteration.

📅 Jan 2026 – Present 🔗 linkedin.com/in/lakshayagarwal01

The Goals
  • Increase brand visibility across platforms
  • Grow organic reach through SEO content
  • Maintain 3–4 posts/week consistently
  • Cut content creation time with AI tools
Skills Acquired
How I Did It
  • Editorial System

    Built a data-driven weekly content calendar — posting 3–4×/week on AI tools, marketing strategy, and growth insights. Each post crafted with a tested hook-body-CTA format.

  • AI-Assisted Production

    Used Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini to accelerate ideation, copy editing, and format iteration — cutting creation time by ~50% while improving consistency.

  • Analytics & Iteration

    Tracked post performance weekly via Buffer analytics. Identified top-performing formats and doubled engagement rate by iterating hooks and structure every 7 days.

CREATIVE WORK
03 — Brand Identity Logo Design

Brand identity for Avira Diamonds — luxury jewellery with elegant green-and-gold visual language — and PM11 Club, a social brand built around bold editorial typography and connection.

Tools
04 — SEO Content Blog Content

SEO-optimised blog articles and visual covers for Nation Innovation — covering On-Device AI, Artemis 2, and Neuromophic Computing. Combining compelling visuals with search-optimised copy to drive organic traffic.
